data.body: Implemented RED baseline in tests/unit/test_llm_failure_matrix.py (31 tests, all green on today's code). Committed a63ae39cc atop the stack (rebar-ticket trailer, Change-Id present). Pins: runner-level classification matrix (18 cases: HTTP/timeout/refusal/incomplete->LLMUnavailableError, canned content_filter+length finish_reason->UnretryableOutputError, unparseable->StructuredOutputError, model-raised UsageLimitExceeded->LLMRunnerError); derived UsageLimits(request_limit=max(1,ceil(mi/2)),tool_calls_limit=max(8,mi)) via spy; gate two-scope (systemic->INDETERMINATE unsigned; ladder re-raises systemic, drops non-systemic finder fail-open); guards (text mode ignores finish_reason; disabled code-review never invokes runner); meta-test enforces CURRENT(<file>:<line>) marker per row. lint+format+typecheck clean. Not closing until Verified +1 at endgame.
